street.description: Street (or slash-joined street pair) the resident restriction applies to

locality.description: Village/neighborhood qualifier given in the source (e.g. 'Newton Upper Falls', 'Waban'); empty if none

side.description: Side of street; empty when not stated

from_point.description: Reference street/landmark at the start of the segment

from_offset_direction.description: Compass direction of the from_point offset

to_point.description: Reference street/landmark at the end of the segment; 'end' for the street's end

to_offset_direction.description: Compass direction of the to_point offset

extent.description: 'entire length' when the restriction covers the whole street; empty otherwise

times.description: Time window when the restriction applies; empty means at all times

notes.description: Sub-clause detail (e.g. drive/reservation qualifiers) or administrative provisions that are not a single mappable segment
